title: mentha × teriana
intro: Mentha × teriana, also known as Red Pennyroyal, is a hybrid plant species derived from the combination of Mentha pulegium (Pennyroyal) and Mentha aquatica (Water Mint). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural insect repellent, antimicrobial agent, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × teriana include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Mentha × teriana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
